data.title: Sectigo Partners with F5 to Deliver Automated Certificate Lifecycle Management Across F5 ADSP
data.description: Sectigo, a renowned provider of automated Certificate Lifecycle Management and digital certificates, has collaborated with F5 in Scottsdale, Arizona. This partnership aims to improve CLM within the F5 Application Delivery and Security Platform. By automating processes such as issuance, deployment, renewal, and replacement of SSL/TLS certificates, organizations utilizing F5 ADSP can mitigate manual efforts and prevent certificate-related outages. This partnership establishes Sectigo as a key ally in the F5 ADSP Partner Program, offering enhanced efficiency and reliability for SSL/TLS certificates in F5 ADSP environments.

data.title: Ansa Biotechnologies to Showcase Breakthrough DNA Synthesis Technology Backed by Industry’s Only On-Time Guarantee at SynBioBeta 2026 Conference
data.description: Ansa Biotechnologies, based in Emeryville, California, has revealed details about its participation at the SynBioBeta 2026 conference. The company is set to deliver a series of presentations during the event.

data.title: Fed Meeting: Key Questions As Powell Passes Torch To Warsh
data.description: Jerome Powell's future, along with the Federal Reserve's data dependency and balance sheet policy, are undergoing changes. Following the Fed meeting, important questions arise as Powell transitions the leadership to Warsh.

data.title: Quantum Computing Stocks Are Next Big Play After AI, Says Defiance ETF Executive
data.description: A top executive at Defiance ETFs, Sylvia Jablonski, has discussed the significant investment opportunities in quantum computing stocks. According to Jablonski, these stocks are poised to be the next major trend after AI. This information was shared by Investor's Business Daily.
Total CEO: Tanker with company cargo exited the Persian Gulf.

data.title: Why SoFi Stock Is Tumbling Despite Earnings Doubling
data.description: Despite doubling its earnings, Sofi only met Q1 expectations, and the fintech company lowered its guidance for Q2 revenue. As a result, Sofi's stock experienced a significant decline on Wednesday.

data.title: Garmin Beats Q1 Goals But Sticks With Prior Full-Year Outlook
data.description: In the first quarter, Garmin exceeded expectations, but maintained its full-year forecast without any changes. Despite beating the Q1 goals, the company's stock declined following the report.

data.title: Biogen Walloped Wall Street's First Quarter Views; Here's What Happened
data.description: Biogen surpassed Wall Street's projections for the first quarter by a large margin on Wednesday. The company's growth products saw an impressive increase in sales, significantly exceeding expectations. This strong performance was a key factor in Biogen's outstanding financial results for the quarter. The company's achievement has garnered attention from investors and analysts.

data.title: Zebra Technologies Makes Strategic Investment in Apera AI to Drive Intelligent Automation
data.description: Zebra Ventures, the corporate venture capital arm of Zebra Technologies Corporation, has made a strategic investment in Apera AI, a company specializing in 4D Vision for industrial robots. This investment showcases Zebra's commitment to advancing digitalization and automation in workflows to enhance frontline operations for companies in manufacturing, logistics, and other sectors. Apera AI's innovative 4D Vision technology provides cutting-edge solutions for industrial robots. Zebra Technologies Corporation is listed on the NASDAQ as ZBRA.

data.title: Navigator Gas Announces Date for the Release of First Quarter 2026 Results and Zoom Conference Call
data.description: Navigator Holdings Ltd., also known as Navigator Gas and trading under the ticker symbol NVGS on the NYSE, is set to report its financial results for the first quarter of 2026 on May 6, 2026. As the largest fleet operator of handysize liquefied gas carriers globally, the company will unveil its performance for the three months leading up to March 31, 2026. The announcement will occur before the opening of markets in New York.

data.title: Alpha Modus Partners with InComm Payments to Bring Alpha Cash to Thousands of Retail Locations Nationwide
data.description: AMOD, a leading fintech company, has joined forces with InComm Payments to introduce a new service allowing Alpha Cash deposits at over 90,000 retail outlets. This strategic collaboration aims to enhance access to fintech services for underbanked consumers.

data.title: FCC in conflict with Disney again. A cautionary tale on repercussions of upsetting Trump. #news #FCC #Disney
data.description: Once again, the Federal Communications Commission is in conflict with a major media corporation, highlighting the repercussions of upsetting President Trump. This clash underscores the ongoing tensions between the FCC and the media industry, emphasizing the significant impact of political relationships on the regulatory landscape.

data.title: Candel Therapeutics Announces Commercialization Agreement with EVERSANA to Support Potential U.S. Launch of Aglatimagene Besadenovec in Localized Prostate Cancer
data.description: Candel is being prepared for a potential commercial launch in the United States by EVERSONA, a partner-led commercial organization. This comes after the planned submission of a Biologics License Application (BLA) is scheduled for the fourth quarter of 2026.

data.title: Pericles Capital Acts as Financial Advisor to Urgently in Acquisition by Agero
data.description: A financial advisory firm, Pericles Capital, recently facilitated the acquisition of Urgent.ly, Inc. (Nasdaq: ULY), a prominent global mobility and roadside assistance platform, by Agero, Inc. The transaction, managed by Pericles Capital and Seaport Global Securities LLC, a FINRA/SIPC member, marks a significant collaboration between two pioneering companies in the mobility and roadside assistance industries. This deal showcases the merging of industry leaders in a groundbreaking move.

data.title: Mopria Alliance Surpasses 10,000 Certified Product Models, Expanding Universal Print and Scan Across Platforms
data.description: A global non-profit organization, The Mopria® Alliance, headquartered in San Ramon, California, has made significant progress by exceeding 10,000 Mopria certified product models. This achievement signifies a substantial growth in their universal ecosystem, making printing and scanning simpler and more convenient for users across various platforms. Established in 2013 by Canon, HP, Samsung, and Xerox, Mopria is now a trusted solution for billions of individuals globally.

data.title: Stock Market Today: Dow Seesaws Ahead Of Fed Decision, Powell; Robinhood Plunges On Earnings (Live Coverage)
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index showed instability as it hovered on Wednesday in anticipation of the Federal Reserve's interest rate announcement and comments from Powell. Robinhood experienced a significant drop. The market fluctuated as investors awaited the Federal Reserve's decision, with the Dow Jones index showing uncertainty. Robinhood faced a steep decline in earnings. The day was marked by intense anticipation and market insecurity, with the Dow Jones fluctuating and Robinhood experiencing a notable plunge. The Federal Reserve's interest rate decision and Powell's remarks kept investors on edge, contributing to the market's wavering performance.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures: Seagate, Bloom Energy, Teradyne Lead Earnings Movers As Oil Prices Jump
data.description: Technology stocks are on the rise following a significant jump in oil prices. Seagate and Bloom Energy are leading the way as top earners. Earnings movers include Seagate, Bloom Energy, and Teradyne, with upcoming reports expected from major tech companies like Google, Meta, Microsoft, and Amazon. This surge in tech sector performance comes amidst a backdrop of increased oil prices. This information was reported by Investor's Business Daily.
